items.name: Viscose Georgette Saree
items.description: Elegant viscose georgette saree with blouse piece. Lightweight, vibrant, and perfect for festive occasions.

items.name: Pure Soft Cotton Sungudi Saree
items.description: 120 count pure soft cotton sungudi saree with blouse piece. Traditional weave with a modern touch.

items.name: Semi Kanchipuram Silk Saree
items.description: Rich semi Kanchipuram silk saree with traditional motifs and contrast border. Ideal for weddings and celebrations.

items.name: Warm Silk Saree
items.description: Luxurious warm silk saree with beautiful golden border. Rich drape and premium finish for special occasions.

items.name: Handloom Cotton Saree
items.description: Classic handloom cotton saree with elegant block print design. Comfortable and stylish for everyday wear.

items.name: Designer Tissue Saree
items.description: Exquisite designer tissue saree with intricate embroidery and matching blouse piece. Perfect for parties and events.
